metadata.response_content:
```json
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM",
      "cwe_id": "CWE-79",
      "title": "Potential Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability",
      "line_number": 1,
      "description": "User input from request.form is accessed without proper sanitization or encoding. If this data is later rendered in HTML responses without proper escaping, it could lead to XSS attacks.",
      "fix": "Implement proper input sanitization and output encoding. Use framework-specific methods like html.escape() or template auto-escaping."
    },
    {
      "severity": "MEDIUM", 
      "cwe_id": "CWE-20",
      "title": "Insufficient input validation",
      "line_number": 2,
      "description": "The validate_input() function is called but its implementation is not visible. Insufficient validation could allow malicious input to bypass security controls.",
      "fix": "Ensure validate_input() implements comprehensive validation including: input length limits, character whitelisting, format validation, and sanitization of special characters."
    },
    {
      "severity": "LOW",
      "cwe_id": "CWE-209",
      "title": "Potentially inadequate error handling",
      "line_number": 5,
      "description": "Generic error_response() may not provide sufficient information for debugging while potentially leaking sensitive information to attackers.",
      "fix": "Implement proper error handling that logs detailed errors securely while returning generic error messages to users. Avoid exposing internal system details."
    }
  ],
  "risk_level": "MEDIUM",
  "recommendation": "REVIEW"
}
```
